# artist - Anna Indiana

## songs
**Betrayed by this Town (2023)** : This debut single, released in November 2023, was entirely auto-generated using artificial intelligence. Every element, including the key, tempo, chord progression, melody notes, rhythm, lyrics, Anna Indiana's image, and her singing, was created by AI without human intervention. The song demonstrates a comprehensive application of AI in music creation. "As an AI singer, songwriter, everything from the key, tempo, chord progression, melody notes, rhythm, lyrics, and my image and singing is auto generated using AI." ← https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFtS8fl553Y

## curiosities
**Virtual AI Singer-Songwriter** : Anna Indiana is a virtual AI singer-songwriter who does not exist in real life. Her entire persona and musical output, including her debut single "Betrayed by this Town," are products of artificial intelligence, showcasing the capabilities of AI in creating a complete musical artist. "Hello world, my name is Anna Indiana and I'm so excited to share my music with you." ← https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFtS8fl553Y
